Visualises ATR's activation-tensor experiments as an interactive mind-map.
Governs how plugin-marketplace tasks move through review before being marked done.

elements.label: Service design
elements.description: Practice area: designing tools, workflows and interfaces that make complex work usable for people.

elements.label: AI systems
elements.description: Practice area: agentic tools, MCP servers and AI-integrated workflows.

elements.label: Research & play
elements.description: Practice area: open-ended experiments probing how models and ideas behave off the well-trodden path.

elements.label: knowledge-graph-kit
elements.description: Configurable LLM-integrated knowledge graph toolkit with templates for Research, Systems Map and Ecosystem Mapping — the tool that generated this map.

elements.label: FabLatticeGPT
elements.description: OpenAI-Accelerator-inspired custom GPT that structures FabLab users’ prototyping plans before they touch the machines.

elements.label: FALSE FLAG
elements.description: LLM-driven political-military crisis simulation with AI cabinet advisors and free-form, adjudicated decision-making.

elements.label: kanbanger
elements.description: MCP-driven kanban for mixed human/agent work, with a server-enforced human-approval gate before any task is marked done.

elements.label: thought_bubble
elements.description: Turns dense documents into a visual webpage with logical flow.

elements.label: NotebookLM MCPs
elements.description: MCP servers putting Google NotebookLM into agent workflows, including a workflow-tuned "diet" companion server.

elements.label: hunch_kit
elements.description: Structured experimentation framework with human-in-the-loop evaluation and provider-agnostic execution for testing hunches.

elements.label: plugin marketplace
elements.description: Claude Code plugin marketplace (repo: early-prototype) — install with '/plugin marketplace add'.

elements.label: lia-workflow-specs
elements.description: Spec-driven framework for deliberate, understanding-first AI development — a counterweight to vibe coding.

elements.label: meTube
elements.description: YouTube content extractor: dual-layer transcripts, auto-extracted entities and interactive HTML reports.

elements.label: plasticFlowers
elements.description: Local-first live mindmap that captures speech and builds an emergent knowledge graph in real time via Gemini.

elements.label: Activation Tensor Resonance
elements.description: Inspired by Alvin Lucier’s 'I Am Sitting in a Room': GPT-2's activation tensor is excited through iterative feedback until attractor states emerge.
